categories.title: Sign Rules
categories.description: How positive and negative signs interact.

cards.explanation: Positive plus positive stays positive.
Take the sign of the larger number.
Negative plus negative goes more negative.
Two positives multiplied stay positive.
Different signs multiply to negative.
Two negatives multiplied become positive.

categories.title: Exponent Rules
categories.description: How powers behave in multiplication, division, and nesting.

cards.explanation: Same base? Add the exponents.
Same base? Subtract the exponents.
Power of a power? Multiply exponents.
Any number to the power 0 is always 1.
Negative exponent flips to a fraction.
Distribute the power across the product.

categories.title: Algebraic Identities
categories.description: Fundamental expansions and factorisations used everywhere.

cards.explanation: Square of a sum — always 3 terms.
Square of a difference — middle term is negative.
Difference of squares factors into two brackets.
Cube of a sum — 4 terms with coefficients 1, 3, 3, 1.
Cube of a difference — alternate signs.
Sum of cubes — same sign then opposite in second bracket.
Difference of cubes — sign flips in second bracket.
Same denominator? Just add the numerators.
Different denominators? Cross-multiply and add.
Multiply straight across — tops and bottoms.
Dividing by a fraction? Flip and multiply.
Any number divided by 1 is itself.
Zero divided by anything is always zero.

categories.title: Order of Operations
categories.description: The correct sequence for evaluating expressions.

cards.explanation: Brackets, Orders, Division/Multiplication, Addition/Subtraction.
Multiply before Add (not 20).
Brackets override everything.
Equal precedence? Work left to right.
